channel.title: Software on jamesm.blog
channel.description: Recent content in Software on jamesm.blog

item.title: The Best Music Production Software in 2026
item.description: A 2026 tour of the DAWs worth building a studio around - Ableton Live 12, Logic Pro 12, Cubase 15, Fender Studio Pro 8, Bitwig 6, Reason 14, and the first wave of AI-native workstations.

item.title: Copy Protection Wars: The Ingenious Schemes Of 1980s Software
item.description: A deep dive into the creative, bizarre, and often frustrating world of 1980s copy protection, from code wheels to lensloks.

item.title: The Best Music Production Software in 2025
item.description:
Whether you’re sketching out your first track, pumping out hip‑hop beats, scoring films, or mixing for a full band, 2025 offers an exciting landscape of music production software (DAWs) with something for everyone. A digital audio workstation (DAW) is where ideas become demos and demos become finished releases - so choosing one that fits your workflow is crucial. Here’s where you’ll want to start.

Ableton Live 12 – Creative Powerhouse for Electronic & Live Artists

Ableton Live has long been the darling of electronic producers, DJs, and experimental musicians thanks to its uniquely flexible workflow and loop-based Session View. In 2025, Live 12 continues to lead with fluid real-time manipulation, robust MIDI and audio tools, and deep integration with controllers and hardware - all of which make it a standout choice whether you’re performing or producing.

item.title: Favourite Computers, Consoles & Mobiles
item.description: Personal history and collection of favourite computers, gaming consoles, and mobile devices from the 1970s to present day.

item.title: List of links for best DJ gear, controllers & software

item.title: Apple finally allows game emulators in the App Store
item.description: News and resources about Apple's decision to allow game emulators in the App Store, including Delta, Dolphin, and retro emulator apps.

item.title: News: Arturia Collection X
item.description: Announcement of Arturia V Collection X featuring 39 professional software instruments and sound emulations.

item.title: Favourite Computer Games
item.description: Personal collection of favourite computer and console games across decades of gaming history.
